title: Sale and purchase activity of dry bulk comparatively tanker
section_path: Sale and purchase activity of dry bulk comparatively tanker
section_path_text: Sale and purchase activity of dry bulk comparatively tanker
summary:
Main
By Yiannis Parganas
The dry bulk sale and purchase activity has demonstrated remarkable strength this year, achieving the second-largest volume of transactions in the sector's history, surpassed only by the record of 403 sales in 2021. Notably, in the first five months of 2024, 362 dry bulk sales (>20kdwt) were recorded, representing an increase of 87 transactions compared to the same period in 2023. Within the various size categories, geared sizes garnered the most attention.
